title: Log Parameters Management in Hadoop MapReduce v2
description: The LogParams.java file in the Hadoop MapReduce v2 directory (v2/LogParams.java) is responsible for managing log parameters. It encapsulates and stores crucial job identifiers such as container ID, application ID, node ID, and owner. The class provides a simple data storage mechanism using private instance variables and getter/setter methods for these variables. It doesn't directly handle inputs or outputs but stores parameters that are likely used elsewhere in the Hadoop MapReduce framework for logging or tracking purposes. This class is part of the Hadoop MapReduce v2 library, indicating its role in the broader Hadoop ecosystem. It implies collaboration with other components for managing logs or job-related information, following a typical data encapsulation architectural pattern.

TITLE: Log Parameters Management in Hadoop MapReduce v2

DESCRIPTION:
The LogParams.java file in the Hadoop MapReduce v2 directory (v2/LogParams.java) is responsible for managing log parameters. It encapsulates and stores crucial job identifiers such as container ID, application ID, node ID, and owner. The class provides a simple data storage mechanism using private instance variables and getter/setter methods for these variables. It doesn't directly handle inputs or outputs but stores parameters that are likely used elsewhere in the Hadoop MapReduce framework for logging or tracking purposes. This class is part of the Hadoop MapReduce v2 library, indicating its role in the broader Hadoop ecosystem. It implies collaboration with other components for managing logs or job-related information, following a typical data encapsulation architectural pattern.
